site.title: Business Cards | ION Print & Promo
site.description: Trust in ION Print & Promo for low-priced business cards to get you noticed. We design and print a wide variety in-house for high-quality results and service.

centreText.title: Make A Great First Impression
centreText.description: Business cards still matter. They're quick, personal, and memorable, and say a lot about you and your brand.

features.title: Styles For Every Business & Budget
features.description:
At ION Print & Promo, we design and print business cards that help Simcoe County businesses, teams, non-profits, and organizations stand out with confidence.

We offer a wide range of options to match your brand, industry, and budget, including:

  • Standard matte & gloss cards
  • Premium thick stock
  • Soft-touch finishes
  • Rounded corners
  • Eco-friendly paper options
  • Vertical, square, & custom sizes

From clean and minimal to bold and creative, we'll help you choose the right look for how you want to be remembered.

features.title: Elevated Finishes: Raised UV & Spot UV
features.description:
Want your card to really stand out? Raised UV and Spot UV finishes add texture and shine exactly where you want it, such as on your logo, name, or key design elements.

These finishes help create a tactile, high-end feel while drawing attention to your branding and making your card more memorable.

It's a subtle upgrade that makes a big impact, and is priced less than you'd think!

features.title: Better Pricing For Bigger Teams & Larger Orders
features.description:
If you're ordering for a team, multiple departments, or ongoing staff changes, we make it cost-effective and simple.

For larger orders and team card programs, we can help with:

  • Volume discounts
  • Consistent branding
  • Easy reorders
  • Fast turnaround

We also deliver locally in the Barrie area and offer convenient shipping to all other locations.
